## 1.Basic RSA-TAMUctf

描述： 

```
To: Dr. Rivest
CC: Dr. Shamir
```

file.txt

```
N = 2095975199372471
e = 5449
gigem{ 875597732337885 1079270043421597 616489707580218 2010079518477891 1620280754358135 616660320758264 86492804386481 171830236437002 1500250422231406 234060757406619 1461569132566245 897825842938043 2010079518477891 234060757406619 1620280754358135 2010079518477891 966944159095310 1669094464917286 1532683993596672 171830236437002 1461569132566245 2010079518477891 221195854354967 1500250422231406 234060757406619 355168739080744 616660320758264 1620280754358135 }
```

N很小可分解

得到

```
p=21094081
q=99363191
```

那么可以得到d，求解c

参考代码

```
import gmpy2
import math
from Crypto.Util.number import *

n = 2095975199372471
e = 5449
p=21094081
q=99363191
phi=(p-1)*(q-1)
d=pow(e,-1,phi)
flag1=[]
c_list=[875597732337885,1079270043421597,616489707580218,2010079518477891,1620280754358135,616660320758264,86492804386481,171830236437002,1500250422231406,234060757406619,1461569132566245,897825842938043,2010079518477891,234060757406619,1620280754358135,2010079518477891,966944159095310,1669094464917286,1532683993596672,171830236437002,1461569132566245,2010079518477891,221195854354967,1500250422231406,234060757406619,355168739080744,616660320758264,1620280754358135]
for i in c_list:
    m=pow(i,d,n)
    flag_i=chr(m)
    flag1.append(flag_i)
flag=''.join(flag1)
print(flag)
```

获得RSA_s3cur1ty_1s_4b0ut_pr1m3s

gigem{RSA_s3cur1ty_1s_4b0ut_pr1m3s}

## 2.easyXor-0xGame

描述：0xGame{}

file.txt

```
from random import randint
from secret import flag

flag+="^"
cipher=[]
for i in range(len(flag)-1):
    cipher.append(ord(flag[i])^ord(flag[i+1]))
print(cipher)
#[72, 63, 38, 12, 8, 30, 30, 6, 82, 4, 84, 88, 92, 7, 79, 29, 8, 90, 85, 26, 25, 87, 80, 10, 20, 20, 9, 4, 80, 73, 31, 5, 82, 0, 1, 92, 0, 0, 94, 81, 4, 85, 27, 35]
```

已知最后一个字符是^，ord（'^'）=94

从后往前推

参考代码

```
import gmpy2
import math
from Crypto.Util.number import *

cipher = [72, 63, 38, 12, 8, 30, 30, 6, 82, 4, 84, 88, 92, 7, 79, 29, 8, 90, 85, 26, 25, 87, 80, 10, 20, 20, 9, 4, 80, 73, 31, 5, 82, 0, 1, 92, 0, 0, 94, 81, 4, 85, 27, 35]
flag = [94]
for c in reversed(cipher):
    flag.append(c ^ flag[-1])
flag = flag[::-1]
print(''.join(chr(x) for x in flag))
```

获得0xGame{ec15a9eb-08b7-4c39-904d-27eed888f73f}
